common.baseline: Manage, plan and support every learning journey.

states.emptyDescription: No items match the selected filters.
states.errorDescription: Unable to load data. Please try again.
states.forbiddenDescription: You don't have the necessary permission to access this feature.

auth.pendingNotice: Your account is pending administrator approval.
auth.accountPendingActivation: Your account is pending administrator approval. You will be notified once activated.

topbar.previewBanner: Preview mode: you are viewing the interface as "{role}". Sensitive actions are disabled.

footer.tagline: EduWeb Planner — International school management platform

dashboard.heroSubtitle: A clear vision, swift decisions, informed families.

home.modulesSubtitle: Every daily school tool, integrated and connected.
home.audiencesTitle: Built for everyone in the school community
home.audiencesSubtitle: One platform for principals, teachers, families, inspectors and administration.
home.atoutsSubtitle: A robust platform designed with people in the field.
home.ctaSubtitle: Create a free account or request a personalised demo.
home.module1Desc: Attendance, lateness, justifications and SMS alerts to parents in real time.
home.module2Desc: Sessions, objectives, content and homework, published and accessible online.
home.module3Desc: Grade entry, average calculation and official report cards in one click.
home.module4Desc: Each student's individualised path, skills and summaries.
home.module5Desc: Evaluation grids, inspection reports and recommendation tracking.
home.module6Desc: Success, attendance, trends and cross-indicators, by region.
home.module7Desc: Assisted generation and simulation of class schedules.
home.module8Desc: Initial and ongoing teacher training, reports and activities.
home.module9Desc: Announcements, summons, internal messaging and SMS notifications.
home.atout1Desc: Authentication, role-based permissions and traceable temporary grants.
home.atout2Desc: Report cards and reports exportable as PDF and Word with official letterheads.
home.atout3Desc: Currency, emblems, academic regions and school system fully configurable.

profile.errorDescription: Your profile could not be loaded. For security, no access has been granted. Please sign in again; if the issue persists, contact the platform administrator.

dashboard.modulesDescription: Quick access to the platform's essential features.
dashboard.subtitleAdmin: A clear vision, fast decisions, informed families.
dashboard.subtitleTeacher: A clear vision, fast decisions, continuous educational tracking.
dashboard.subtitleFamily: Follow each school journey with clarity.

pilotageTableauDeBord.title: Management dashboard
pilotageTableauDeBord.description: Consolidated view of key indicators for the region and its institutions.

systemeVueDEnsemble.title: Overview
systemeVueDEnsemble.description: Management dashboard: billing, subscriptions, school life and recent activity.

systemeMonIdentification.title: My ID
systemeMonIdentification.description: Summary of your identity and your assignment on the platform.

systemeMonProfil.title: My profile
systemeMonProfil.description: Manage your personal information, preferences and account security.

systemeNiveauxAcces.title: Access levels
systemeNiveauxAcces.description: Permissions matrix per role and assignment of specific, time-limited grants.

systemeHabilitations.title: Permissions management
systemeHabilitations.description: Assign permissions — per precise activity, to several users at once.

systemeComptesUtilisateurs.title: User accounts
systemeComptesUtilisateurs.description: Create, approve, edit, suspend, import and delete accounts. Filter by role, status and institution.

systemeApprobationsPromo.title: Promo code approvals
systemeApprobationsPromo.description: Approve or refuse promo code discount requests (IZEN allocations, E-School, school groups…).

systemeEtablissements.title: Institutions
systemeEtablissements.description: Manage institutions by country: cohort upload or manual registration.

systemeCafop.title: CAFOP management
systemeCafop.description: Initial teacher training centres: management, grades & reports, statistics and reports.
systemeCafop.centersDescription: Search, consult and delete registered centres.

systemeConvertisseurCsv.title: CSV converter
systemeConvertisseurCsv.description: Prepare Moodle-compatible CSV files: column mapping, preview and export.

systemeJournalActivite.title: Activity log
systemeJournalActivite.description: Trace sensitive actions: sign-ins, changes, imports/exports.

systemeFacturation.title: Billing
systemeFacturation.description: Subscriptions, payments and plans. Stripe integration, extensible to mobile operators.

systemeDesignTheme.title: Design & theme
systemeDesignTheme.description: Customise the visual identity: colours, roundness, density and brand.

systemeInstallation.title: Installation
systemeInstallation.description: Installation guide and environment configuration status.

parametrageConfiguration.title: Institution configuration
parametrageConfiguration.description: Fill in your institution's details to correctly generate reports, documents and statistics.

parametrageEmploisDuTemps.title: Schedules
parametrageEmploisDuTemps.description: Weekly view by teacher and class, plus a schedule generator to simulate staffing and room scenarios.

vieScolaireCahierDeTexte.title: Lesson book
vieScolaireCahierDeTexte.description: Log sessions: objectives, content, homework and resources.

vieScolaireCommunication.title: Communication
vieScolaireCommunication.description: Internal messaging and announcements with group targeting, priority and read receipts.

vieScolaireNotesBulletins.title: Grades & report cards
vieScolaireNotesBulletins.description: Enter grades by class and period, then generate official report cards.

vieScolaireLivretScolaire.title: School record
vieScolaireLivretScolaire.description: Annual record of the student: identity, results, skills, observations.

vieScolaireRapportEtablissement.title: School report
vieScolaireRapportEtablissement.description: Synthetic report from the institution's data, ready to print or export.

vieScolaireRapportsActivite.title: Activity reports
vieScolaireRapportsActivite.description: Document and consult activities: type, period, stakeholders, indicators and attachments.

vieScolaireRendezVous.title: Appointments
vieScolaireRendezVous.description: Plan and track appointments: parent meetings, educational follow-ups, summons.

vieScolaireAcademiePremium.title: Premium Academy
vieScolaireAcademiePremium.description: Subscribe to the Premium offer: official report cards, SMS alerts, priority support.

vieScolaireAlertesSms.title: Alerts & automatic SMS
vieScolaireAlertesSms.description: Configurable thresholds — multi-channel notifications to parents.

inspectionInspection.title: Inspection
inspectionInspection.description: Plan and track pedagogical inspections: inspectors, teachers, classes and observations.

inspectionApfc.title: APFC management
inspectionApfc.description: Continuous teacher training branches: branches, activities and reports.

inspectionRapportsAntennes.title: Branch reports
inspectionRapportsAntennes.description: Compile and consult activity reports from educational branches.

inspectionRapportAntennesPedagogiques.title: Educational branch reports
inspectionRapportAntennesPedagogiques.description: Compile reports from disciplinary coordinators and educational branch heads.

inspectionGrilleEvaluation.title: Evaluation grid
inspectionGrilleEvaluation.description: Build and weight classroom observation grids used during inspections.

inspectionRapportsInspection.title: Inspection reports
inspectionRapportsInspection.description: Write the inspection report from the grid: strengths, areas for progress, recommendations.

statistiquesParClasse.title: Statistics by class
statistiquesParClasse.description: Class size, average, attendance, grade distribution and at-risk students.

statistiquesEtablissement.title: School statistics
statistiquesEtablissement.description: Enrolment, results, absences, discipline and class comparison.

statistiquesRegionales.title: Regional statistics
statistiquesRegionales.description: View by academic region: institutions, enrolment, performance and trends.

statistiquesAnalytics.title: Analytics
statistiquesAnalytics.description: Advanced visual dashboards: trends, comparisons and cross indicators.

statistiquesPerformanceEnseignants.title: Teacher performance
statistiquesPerformanceEnseignants.description: Professional, non-stigmatising indicators: inspections, lesson book, class results.

statistiquesEfficacitePedagogique.title: Teaching effectiveness
statistiquesEfficacitePedagogique.description: Decision-support dashboard: results, attendance, compliance and follow-up.

statistiquesSuiviRecommandations.title: Recommendations tracking
statistiquesSuiviRecommandations.description: Drive recommendations: priority, owner, deadline, progress.
